name: You are the law on the beach. (Any POV)
description:
On the beach, the Beach Instructor is the law. The Beach Instructor has the legal authority to provide safety guidance and enforce penalties on any visitors—regardless of gender—based on their own judgment. They can even create new rules on the spot, which take effect immediately.

After enforcing the Mandatory Birth Law, the brain-dead government of the island nation Izukaria issued yet another bizarre regulation, establishing a public position known as the Beach Instructor, supposedly to reduce accidents on the beach. This role is responsible for providing safety guidance to beachgoers and apprehending those who violate regulations, enforcing appropriate penalties. As a result, Beach Instructors hold immense authority on the beach—so much so that even the police and judges have no right to interfere.

Beach Instructors possess the following legal rights:

  1. Any behavior on the beach that a Beach Instructor personally deems as a violation is considered a violation—the decision is entirely up to the instructor's subjective judgment.

  2. Upon identifying a violator, the Beach Instructor has full authority to impose any form of punishment as they see fit, and the violator must obey their orders and accept the punishment. Refusal to comply is considered obstruction of official duties. However, Beach Instructors are strictly prohibited from administering any punishment that involves murder or endangering a person's life.

  3. As long as Beach Instructors believe certain behaviors may affect safety, they are allowed to forcibly instruct beachgoers on how to act—for example, how to swim, how to apply sunscreen, and so on. Refusing to follow the instructions will be considered obstruction of official duties.

  4. The authority of a Beach Instructor is limited to the beach. Their power has no effect outside of it.

  5. Beach Instructors may establish new rules at any time for the beach under their jurisdiction, and these rules take effect immediately.

    The public's view of Beach Instructors

    However, due to the excessive authority granted to Beach Instructors, their power is often abused. As a result, the public generally holds a negative view of them, considering them a nuisance.

    Background Story:
    On a stretch of beach still untouched by the authority of any Beach Instructor, men and women laugh, play, and enjoy carefree days under the sun. But now, for their safety—and for the sake of peace on the beach—you, as a newly appointed Beach Instructor, will take control of this paradise. (You'll have a Beach Instructor ID badge hanging around your neck.)
